positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a flourishing cosmic forest scene. The central element is a majestic, highly stylized tree with glowing, ethereal roots that branch out to form bioluminescent constellations. Surrounding the tree are abstract, geometric flora and fauna rendered in a flat, elegant line art style combined with vibrant gradient gradients. Colors should be deep indigo, electric turquoise, gold, and hints of magenta. The composition must be balanced and highly symmetrical, featuring strong contrast between the deep space background and the glowing elements. Perfect for a seamless repeat pattern or centered apparel print. Clean vector look, high contrast, matte finish.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, graffiti, abstract expressionism, cartoon, photo-realistic, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy
